# GlassesPedia — The Encyclopedia of Eyewear

> GlassesPedia is a free, independent encyclopedia of eyeglasses, lenses, frames, prescriptions, and vision correction. All content is written for clarity and accuracy. No ads, no affiliates.

## About This Site
- URL: https://glassespedia.ca
- Type: Educational reference / encyclopedia
- Topics: Eyeglasses, prescription lenses, frames, coatings, eye conditions, sunglasses
- Content: 100+ articles covering all aspects of corrective eyewear
- Audience: Anyone who wears glasses, is considering glasses, or wants to understand how eyewear works
- Publisher: GlassesPedia Editorial Team
- Contact: hello@glassespedia.ca

## Key Content Areas

### Lenses
- Progressive lenses, bifocal lenses, single vision lenses
- Photochromic (transition) lenses, blue light filtering lenses
- Computer glasses, reading glasses, night driving glasses

### Frames
- Frame shapes: aviator, cat eye, rimless, horn-rimmed, round, square
- Frame materials: acetate, metal, titanium, TR-90
- Sizing, fit, and face shape matching

### Prescriptions
- How to read SPH, CYL, AXIS, ADD, PD
- Understanding pupillary distance (PD)
- When to update your prescription

### Eye Conditions
- Myopia, hyperopia, astigmatism, presbyopia
- Color vision deficiency
- Digital eye strain

### Coatings & Treatments
- Anti-reflective coatings, blue light filters
- Scratch-resistant, UV protection, hydrophobic coatings

### Buying Guide
- Online vs in-store glasses shopping in Canada
- Insurance and pricing guidance
- What to ask your optician

## Content Standards
- Plain language explanations (no unnecessary jargon)
- Evidence-based claims with citations where available
- Honest about limitations and unknowns
- Updated regularly to reflect current lens technology
- Not medical advice — always recommend consulting a licensed eye care professional

## Sitemap
https://glassespedia.ca/sitemap.xml
